channel.title: Forex Playbook on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Forex Playbook on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio

item.title: Setup: The 45 Degree Break — Rank B
item.description: A fade setup where the market fails to extend a prior trending move after a period of balance, targeting the next reference area below.

item.title: Setup: The Halfback Retest — Rank B
item.description: A context-dependent setup built around a meaningful test and hold of a profile’s halfback, targeting the opposite extreme of that same profile.

item.title: Setup: The Sunday Snack — Rank S
item.description: A rare, high-conviction Sunday setup on USDJPY driven by major Japanese news events — played off the nodes after the release, not before.

item.title: Setup: The HVN Rush — Rank A
item.description: A precision news-driven setup using High Volume Nodes and halfback levels from the catalyst period as entry triggers.

item.title: Setup: The Profile Switch — Rank SSS
item.description: The highest-conviction forex setup. A profile transition at key session boundaries that confirms continuation after an extended single-print move into or past a reference area.
